page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hpc8ae.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 processors. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs, indicating a one-to-one mapping with no hyperthreading enabled. The processors run at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring external network-attached storage for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput communication for clustered environments. The lack of local storage and GPU accelerators represents a design tradeoff, focusing resources entirely on raw CPU compute density and high-speed networking.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated physical core allocation and high clock speed position this instance as a high-density compute resource. It is designed for workloads that benefit from predictable, non-shared CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. Suitable workloads include high-performance computing simulations, compute-intensive engineering tasks, batch processing, and highly parallelized scientific modeling.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hpc8ae.32xlarge is a compute-focused server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 processors. Built on the x86_64 architecture and running under the KVM hypervisor, the instance provides 64 physical cores and 64 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz with no hyperthreading. It features 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on external storage solutions, but offers a high baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for high-performance computing workloads, parallel simulations, and compute-heavy batch processing where dedicated CPU execution and high-speed networking are critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hpc8ae.32xlarge is a dedicated compute instance featuring 64 AMD EPYC physical cores at 3.4 GHz, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-performance workloads.

tagline: A dedicated high-frequency compute instance featuring sixty-four physical cores and high-speed networking for parallelized processing workloads.
